text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
choice_data_list: Do you feel any pain or discomfort?
Do you feel any pain or discomfort?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
My body feels light, and my movements aren't
sluggish.
choice_data_list: Just don't push yourself too hard.
Just don't push yourself too hard.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I'd only end up breaking down, right?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I got hit with some severe fatigue after the spring
Tenno Sho. Now I can understand it from personal
experience.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the fierce showdown at the spring Tenno
Sho, Satono Diamond was extremely fatigued for
quite some time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As a result, we cut down on training and focused
on her recovery. Luckily, it doesn't seem to have
affected her performance negatively.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad I get to put on a show for everyone who
voted for me.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Time to run in the Takarazuka Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'm looking forward to racing you again today,
Kita.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, Dia! Sorry, I didn't hear you.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I said I'm looking forward to the race...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Me too! I won't lose today!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(Kita seems different to how she was at the Osaka
Hai and the spring Tenno Sho...)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: (I hope it's just my imagination, but...)
